prompt: I want to set up Socrates-7. I'm starting from scratch — I don't have a teacher or any project yet. I'm a PhD student in statistics and I want to study deep learning. Help me get started.

assertions.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the create-teacher skill (not just gives generic advice)
Step-by-step interview: Claude asks questions one at a time and waits for answers (not batched)
Persona design: Claude asks for name, personality style, relationship context, and quirks
File creation intent: Claude indicates it will create all 4 files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
Next step guidance: Claude mentions scaffold-project or teaching-session as the next step
